subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Phillips studio in New York, 1912-04-12
subcodes.first_line: I give greeting in love and unity. The affairs of this world are to be accounted as nothing compared
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روز خوبی بود در این عالم ناسوت سروری برای من نمانده جز ملاقات احباء دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @love and unity, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity
